settings.info.broadcast: UDP broadcast settings for sending Wake-on-LAN magic packets.
settings.info.text:
Wake-on-LAN works by sending a special 'magic packet'
to the target device's MAC address on the local network.

This requires the device to support Wake-on-LAN
and have it enabled in the BIOS/UEFI and OS settings.
